a.xlink:title: Declares the node specific parameters.
Initializes the parameters objects.
Static function for getting string representation of a parameter type from template type.
Get the cable gripper frame id.
Get the drone frame id.
Get the fail_on_unable_to_locate value.
Get the flag for whether to generate trajectories asynchronously with one iteration delay.
Get the poll period in ms for waiting for the generation of trajectories.
Get the period for updating the ground estimate.
Get the window size for the ground estimate history.
Get the ground frame id.
Get the maximum euclidean distance to the object before the fail callback is called.
Get the default yaw rate for hovering on a cable.
Get the default z velocity for hovering on a cable.
Get the altitude threshold for the drone to be considered landed.
Get the period for executing maneuvers.
Get the size of the maneuver queue.
Get the timeout for updating a maneuver after registering it.
Get the timeout for the server to start executing a maneuver after Start() has been called.
Get the minimum target altitude for the target position.
Get the number of seconds with no maneuver before the scheduler goes from hovering to idle.
Get the on_cable_max_euc_distance value.
Get the reached position threshold for evaluating if the target position has been reached.
Get whether to use NaNs for velocity and acceleration when hovering, otherwise uses zeros.
Get the world frame id.
Get a parameter.
Gets multiple parameters.
